description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a distinctive two-tone cover. The front and back covers are a marbled, light tan color, while the spine and a vertical strip along the edge are a deep, solid brown. The book appears to be well-used, with visible wear along the edges and some warping of the cover. The pages are thick and slightly yellowed, suggesting age or frequent handling. There is no visible illustration or artwork on the cover, giving it a classic, understated appearance. The spine features faint, gold-embossed text, but no decorative elements or publisher logos are visible.
description: A medium-sized, two-tone hardcover book with a marbled tan cover and a solid brown spine, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, showing a solid brown color with faint gold-embossed text and some wear at the top and bottom edges.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, featuring a marbled tan surface with a vertical brown strip along the left edge and no visible illustration.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the top, revealing the thickness of the yellowed pages and the marbled tan edges of the cover.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, matching the front with a marbled tan finish and a brown strip along the right edge.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is solid brown with faint, gold-embossed text running vertically. There are no decorative patterns or additional elements.
